name: bybit
description: Trade and manage assets on Bybit (spot, derivatives, copy trading, bots, Earn, fiat & on-chain) through the official Bybit MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Trade and manage Bybit assets via the Bybit MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Bybit connects agents to the Bybit exchange through the official Bybit MCP server, enabling spot, derivatives, and options trading, position and account management, copy trading, trading bots, Earn products, fiat/P2P, on-chain Alpha tokens, and TradFi instruments. A central skill orchestrates 12 on-demand command modules and enforces global safety and confirmation rules. Requires BYBIT_API_KEY and BYBIT_API_SECRET.
defaultPrompt: Check my Bybit account wallet balances across spot, derivatives, and funding accounts, then show the total portfolio value in USDT.
Place a limit buy order for BTCUSDT on Bybit spot with a specified quantity and price, then verify the order was filled.
Check the current funding rate and open interest for BTCUSDT perpetual contract on Bybit derivatives.
